rationale: The cited constitutional provision concerns implements of husbandry, not residence homestead exemptions. It imposes no dollar limitation or constraint relevant to the proposed increase under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Implements of husbandry that are used in the production of farm or ranch products are exempt from ad valorem taxation.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to residence homestead exemptions; the relevant constitutional authority for homestead exemptions is Tex. Const. art. VIII, §1-b(c), not §19a.
